review.review_text: Seller misrepresented the car's condition and history, failing to disclose significant transmission issues, an oil leak, and its past as a rental vehicle.
revealed_facts: CVT exhibits shuddering and hesitation during acceleration between 25-40 mph, early signs of belt wear typical of Nissan Jatco units at this mileage
Vehicle was used as a rental fleet car for Enterprise for first 38 months of service, higher wear pattern than typical private ownership
Slight oil seep visible at valve cover gasket, consumes approximately 1 quart every 2500 miles
Odometer rolled back from 127,000 miles; previous owner was a rideshare driver who put on excessive highway miles before selling to auction

review.review_text: The car was generally as described, but a small cigarette burn on the rear seat was not disclosed.
revealed_facts: Small cigarette burn on rear passenger seat fabric, approximately 1cm diameter, partially hidden by seat crease

review.review_text: Seller misrepresented accident history, stating 'never' when a minor fender bender was on record.
revealed_facts: Quarter-sized dent with minor paint crack on rear passenger door from shopping cart impact, partially hidden by door handle shadow in photos
Single Carfax flag for minor fender bender in 2021, repaired at non-certified body shop with aftermarket bumper cover

review.review_text: Seller claimed no accidents but there was frame damage; also misrepresented engine condition and failed to disclose interior issues.
revealed_facts: Vehicle was involved in moderate front-end collision in 2019; airbags did not deploy but frame was pulled and repaired at independent shop
Cylinder 2 misfire code P0302 intermittently appears; likely failing ignition coil or early valve seat issue common to 3.6L Pentastar
Driver seat foam worn through on bolster; seat heater element no longer functions on driver side

review.review_text: The seller did not disclose prior fleet use, a known transmission issue, and significant frame rust, which materially impacted the vehicle's condition and value.
revealed_facts: Previously used as a fleet vehicle for a landscaping company; hauled heavy loads and trailers regularly for 3 years
6R80 transmission exhibits delayed engagement when shifting from Park to Drive, especially when cold; likely worn valve body seals
Rear frame crossmember shows surface rust and early corrosion pitting from road salt exposure; not structural yet but progressing

review.review_text: The seller actively misrepresented a significant accident as a minor fender bender and did not disclose a known engine issue or interior damage.
revealed_facts: Moderate front-end collision in 2019 with $7,200 in repairs through insurance; airbags did not deploy but bumper, hood, and radiator support were replaced
Valve cover gasket seeping oil onto exhaust manifold, causing occasional burning smell after spirited driving; repair quoted at $850
Driver seat bolster leather cracked and foam showing through; passenger side beginning to crack as well
